title: Szczecin Boat Rental 2026: Day on the Water Guide
html:
Set off from Marina Pogoń in central Szczecin for a day exploring the Odra River and Szczecin Lagoon; afternoon half-day hire of a small motorboat starts at approximately 190 EUR, and you can find options through the yacht charter in Szczecin marketplace BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Szczecin

You have several well-served points to start your day on the water. Marina Pogoń sits right on the Odra, about 500 metres from the city centre, and offers fuel, water and a small chandlery. Dąbie Marina lies on Lake Dąbie, a 30-minute walk from the main station, and is the base for many motorboat rentals. Further south, the Oder Harbour in Police gives quicker access to the open Szczecin Lagoon. For those heading towards the Baltic, the port of Świnoujście, 70 km downstream, is a common day-trip destination. The island towns of Wolin and Uznam are visible from the lagoon on a clear day. You can yacht charter in Szczecin for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent

What is the best boat for a day trip on the Odra and Szczecin Lagoon? The choice depends on your party size and desired speed, but a sporty motor cruiser or a spacious catamaran usually works best for a full-day exploration. One option worth a look is the Fairline Targa 43 charter page.

  1. Small motorboat (e.g., Limpopo speedboat) ideal for a couple or three people wanting a quick run across Lake Dąbie; from 190 EUR for a half-day.
  2. Family cruiser (e.g., Fairline Targa 43) perfect for two couples or a family of four with overnighting capability; from 650 EUR for a full day. See the Fairline Targa 43 charter page for live availability in 2026.
  3. Catamaran (e.g., Lagoon 40) best for five to eight guests who value stability and deck space; from 950 EUR for a full day with a skipper.
  4. Luxury motor yacht (e.g., Azimut 50) for up to ten guests with air conditioning and a flybridge; from 1,400 EUR for a day charter.
  5. Sailboat (e.g., Sun Odyssey 44) suited for those who want to tack across the lagoon; from 400 EUR for a half-day, skipper optional.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Szczecin?

Prices in 2026 range from roughly 30 EUR per person for a shared tour to over 1,500 EUR for a crewed luxury yacht for the day. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

  • Shared afternoon sightseeing tour (2 hours, 6-8 passengers): 30-50 EUR per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours, up to 4 people): 190-300 EUR.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours, skipper included, up to 8 guests): 950-1,200 EUR.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (8 hours, full crew, up to 12 guests): 1,400-1,800 EUR, plus fuel.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Szczecin?

Most rental boats in Szczecin require a valid International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or a Polish inland licence for self-drive powerboats over a certain power threshold. Rental operators on BoatHire24 confirm exact requirements for each boat; some small motorboats under 15 kW (20 hp) may be offered without a licence. The high season runs from June to September, when the prevailing south-westerly wind (the westerlies) can make the lagoon choppy in the afternoon.

On the Szczecin Lagoon, morning calms are common, but by midday the westerly breeze builds, so plan your open-water crossing before 11 am for a smoother ride.

At a glance

  • Price band: 30-1,800 EUR per day
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length typical: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Capacity range: 2 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR (prices often quoted in EUR)

Questions about boat rental in Szczecin

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Szczecin?

Yes, many operators offer small motorboats with limited power (usually under 15 kW) that do not require a licence. Always check the boat listing for licence requirements.

How far is Szczecin Lagoon from the city centre by boat?

The Lagoon begins about 15 nautical miles downstream from the city centre, a 40-minute cruise in a powerboat at planning speed.

Are there restaurants or beaches accessible only by boat?

Several small islands in Lake Dąbie have seasonal mooring pontoons and beach bars, such as the one on Wyspa Kępa, reachable by motorboat.

Can I book a boat for a full day with a skipper?

Yes, most larger yachts and catamarans include a skipper in the charter price; you can browse options on BoatHire24.

Whether you are a seasoned sailor or a first-time renter, you can compare verified boat listings and book directly on the BoatHire24 marketplace. If you own a boat in Szczecin, consider listing your vessel to reach thousands of holidaymakers looking for a day on the Odra and the lagoon.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Szczecin and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
